Package com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.permutation

package com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.permutation
Permutation-focused EDA drivers.

Implements routing/order optimization algorithm aliases over edge/position/ranking probabilistic models.

    Package
    Description
    com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
    Top-level algorithm drivers and reusable base classes.

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    EhbsaAlgorithm
    Dedicated EHBSA driver for adjacency-structured permutation optimization.
    KendallPermutationEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated Kendall-distance permutation EDA driver alias.
    MallowsEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated Mallows-model permutation EDA driver.
    PlackettLuceEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated Plackett-Luce permutation EDA driver.
